function.name: semantic_search
function.description: Search documents based on conceptual similarity.
function.long_description: Searches documents by comparing overlapping terms between the user query and document content to approximate semantic similarity.
example_user_queries: Run a semantic search for "ways to reduce cloud costs" in the operations corpus.
Find semantically similar passages about "customer onboarding delays" in support_corpus.
Search the research corpus for content related to "vector databases".
Use semantic search to find ideas similar to "employee retention strategies" in hr_docs.
Look for documents about "multi-region failover" in engineering_corpus.
Search corpus product_specs for material related to "mobile checkout flow".
Find semantically related content for "fraud detection models" in analytics_corpus.
Use semantic search on legal_corpus for "data processing agreements".
Search for concepts similar to "warehouse automation" in logistics_docs.
Run semantic_search with query "forecasting demand spikes" and corpus planning_docs.
